events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. In short: the wrong gasket material was installed and bolt-up is proceeding around it — the gasket must be verified against B16.5 rating and service conditions *before* installation/torqueing per ASME PCC-1, so this is a sequence violation. Work must stop, the joint opened, correct gasket installed, and the PCC-1 star-pattern bolt-up sequence restarted. Decision: `fail`, risk `high`.
